title: Nocturin
description: Welcome to Nocturin, an adventure based modpack where you can explore distant realms, fight monsters, use magic, and explore the terrain!
body:
Welcome to Nocturin!

Nocturin is an adventure-based modpack that combines a variety of fun and exhilarating mods. If you're looking to embark on a magical adventure, this is certainly the pack for you. This modpack incorporates a variety of magic mods that allow you to cast spells, brew curse, and fight a handful of monsters. The terrain incorporates new biomes to explore as well as many new blocks to discover. This is perfect for a solo adventure because there are many NPCs to interact with, but adventuring with friends is so much fun too!

Embark on your journey today.
